title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI through hands-on, manual learning at human pace builds stronger mathematical foundations than relying on contemporary tools. He contends that deep understanding of fundamentals provides education that survives technology cycles and empowers people to shape AI rather than being shaped by it.
